item.text: I’ll chain Zap into Blast for maximum damage this turn, then use the board to kill the wounded raider, cripple the full-health center raider, reinforce, and recruit.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-021.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-021\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":0},{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":3},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-021.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-021.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-021.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-021\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5},\"to\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-017-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-019-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-021-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-014-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-017-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-016-1\",\"deckDamage\":1}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-021.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-021.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-021.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-021.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-021.board.result.json" --summary "P1 chained Zap into Blast, removed P2'"'s wounded raider, heavily damaged the center raider, reinforced the lane, and recruited another raider.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: maximize action tempo by playing both damage cards, clear the low-health threat, use capped deck damage to push the full-health center raider near death, and keep fresh raiders flowing into the fight.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-021.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-021.board.result.json"'

cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-021.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-021\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":0},{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":3},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-021.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-021.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-021.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-021\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5},\"to\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-017-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-019-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-021-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-014-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-017-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-016-1\",\"deckDamage\":1}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-021.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-021.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-021.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-021.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-021.board.result.json" --summary "P1 chained Zap into Blast, removed P2'"'s wounded raider, heavily damaged the center raider, reinforced the lane, and recruited another raider.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: maximize action tempo by playing both damage cards, clear the low-health threat, use capped deck damage to push the full-health center raider near death, and keep fresh raiders flowing into the fight.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-021.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-021.board.result.json"'

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-021`.

Deck line: played `zap`, then `blast`, moved to buy, ended turn. Bought nothing. Produced `4` money and `3` damage.

Board line: moved raiders to `(7,6)`, `(6,5)`, and `(8,3)`, recruited `P1-raider-turn-021-1` at `(10,1)`, removed `P2-raider-turn-014-1`, and dealt `7` damage to `P2-raider-turn-016-1`.

Rationale: chaining Zap into Blast maximized immediate damage, cleared the wounded raider, left the center raider at 1 HP, and kept P1’s raider pipeline flowing into the fight. Strict validation passed.
